title: StreetComplete: Fixing OpenStreetMap, one tiny quest at a time
summary: StreetComplete is a mobile app that gamifies contributing to OpenStreetMap by presenting users with small, localized 'quests' to answer simple questions about their surroundings. It lowers the barrier to mapping, enabling non-experts to improve geospatial data incrementally. The project emphasizes usability and community-driven data collection.
